title: We will choke and die: Delhi HC slams Centre's plan to take over green spaces in Delhi Gymkhana, Polo Grounds
description: .The Delhi High Court on Monday slammed the Central government over its plans to take over the lands of the Delhi Gymkhana Club, Indian Polo Club and Delhi Race Club. Justice Neena Bansal Krishna remarked that Delhi is "choking" due to pollution and that the little green space that is remaining is being taken over by the government.The Court also questioned the government counsel about its plans regarding the heritage structures in places like the Gymkhana Club.
